rulings.Case Title: ERIC MATHEWSON VS. BDO SEIDMAN, LLP, A LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, APRIL 24, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANTS BDO SEIDMAN, LLP, A LIMITED LIABILITY PARTNERSHIP, FRANCOIS HECHINGER'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED; TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. WHETHER ALLEGED DISCOVERY DATE IN THIS CASE SHOULD BE DISREGARDED CANNOT BE DETERMINED AS A MATTER OF LAW FROM THE FACE OF THE PLEADING OR JUDICIALLY NOTICEABLE DOCUMENT. =(302/PJB/PB)

rulings.Case Title: EVERETT HOGGE et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
